🔬

Metal Scanner — Data Matrix / DPM

Standalone decode test

Engine Status
⏳ Loading ZXing-WASM…
These marks are DPM (dot-peen on steel). Decoding depends almost entirely on the capture:
• Use soft, angled light — cover your LED with tissue/paper to diffuse it. Direct glare kills the read.
• Fill the purple box with the code, hold steady, let it focus.
• Keep it running — a good frame wins. Use Capture Frame on the clearest view.
Scanner
Live — scanning…
Align code inside
Point at the metal code
Result
Processed Frames (debug)
Variants tried on the last frame appear here.
Log
Ready.
